fields.name: id_IAU
fields.description: IAU Object ID (VIPERS object name, according to IAU standards)

fields.name: num
fields.description: Object ID; internal id number in the form attxxxxxx where a identifies the sky area (1 for W1 and 4 for W4), tt the CFHTLS tile number, xxxxxx the original CFHTLS ID within the tile

fields.name: selmag
fields.description: Selection mag (CFHTLS T0005 i galactic extinction corrected)

fields.name: zflg
fields.description: Redshift flag: integer part 4/3 = highly secure, 2 = ~90% confidence, 9 = single emission feature, 1 = ~50% chance wrong; prefix 1 = broad-line AGN, prefix 2 = second object in slit; decimal suffix encodes photometric-redshift compatibility. Objects with flag 2.X-9.X are reliable (secure) redshifts

fields.name: norm
fields.description: Normalization factor; the spectrum has been multiplied by this value to be normalized to the selmag value

fields.name: classFlag
fields.description: Selection flag: 1 = VIPERS main galaxy target (colors compatible with z > 0.5); 0 = colors compatible with z < 0.5; -1 = stellar-like object; -2 = i > 22.5; -3 = i < 17.5; -88 = problematic (possibly saturated); -99 = missing photometric data

fields.name: epoch
fields.description: Epoch: 1 = observed before VIMOS refurbishing in summer 2010 (old CCD), 2 = observed after summer 2010 (new CCD)

fields.name: photoMask
fields.description: Photometric mask flag; 1 if the object is inside the photometric mask

fields.name: tsr
fields.description: Target Sampling Rate: TSR = Nspec/Nparent, computed in small rectangular apertures

fields.name: ssr
fields.description: Spectroscopic Success Rate: ratio of galaxies with a successfully measured redshift (flag = 2.*, 3.*, 4.*, 9.*) over the total sample of detected galaxies
